response:
sec. 1  
[the writer is comparing two publishing offers and needs to determine the sales revenue range where publisher a is more lucrative than publisher b]  

sec. 2  
[the inequality is set up to compare the two offers and solve for x]  

sec. 3  
[publisher a's total payment is 3000 plus 5% of x, and publisher b's total payment is 1500 plus 10% of x]  

sec. 4  
[the inequality is written as 3000 + 0.05x > 1500 + 0.10x]  

sec. 5  
[solving the inequality, subtract 1500 from both sides to get 1500 + 0.05x > 0.10x]  

sec. 6  
[subtract 0.05x from both sides to get 1500 > 0.05x]  

sec. 7  
[divide both sides by 0.05 to get 30000 > x]  

sec. 8  
[the solution is x < 30000, meaning sales revenue must be less than 30,000 to make publisher a more lucrative]
